{{CargoClone
|name=Spirit Guide Hela
|rank=red
|cabin=1
|id=1000
|gene1={race} HARD +50
|gene2={race} AFFCT +50
|gene3=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +2.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Dragon Gene Research SPD +0.6%
|gene6=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Dragon Gene Research SPD +1%
|}}
